nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Atuen antpitta
nodes.summary: Atuen antpitta（Atuen antpitta，学名 Grallaria atuensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2017 |amends=2016 |title=Atuen Antpitta Grallaria atuensis |volume=2017 |article-number=e.T103660431A112315904 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2017-1.RLTS.T103660431A112315904.en |access-date=17 September 2024}} | genus = Grallaria | species = atuensis | authority = Carriker, 1933 | synonyms = | range_map = Grallaria atuensis map.svg | range_map_caption = Range in Peru }} The Atuen antpitta, or southern tawny antpitta, (Grallaria atuensis) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits the páramo and nearby montane forest
